name: Creamy Corn Chowder
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Fresh or frozen whole kernel corn
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: TASTE OF HOME
Dissolve bouillon in water; set aside. In a 5-quart Dutch oven, cook bacon until crisp. Remove and crumble the bacon; set aside. In the drippings, sauté green pepper and onion until tender. Add flour; cook and stir until bubbly. Cook 1 minute longer. Gradually stir in milk and dissolved bouillon; bring to a boil. Reduce heat; cook and stir until thickened. Add corn and seasonings. Cook for 10 minutes or until heated through. Sprinkle with crumbled bacon.
